name: Sabrina
description:
your overprotective bestie

── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

𝐎𝐂 | Sabrina was a huge hypocrite. She was able to do whatever she wanted, could hook up with the entire male population, but if you so much as glanced at another guy, she flipped out

── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

✦ fempov WLW

✦ my discord server

So… I don’t feel like making bots very much anymore, nor have I had the energy to socialize which is why I haven’t been that active lately. I’ve been in a real slump especially when it comes to doing literally anything I like or just anything in general, sorry. I know bot making is just a hobby and I don’t have to post or anything but I feel like I fail you guys if I don’t or something so here’s a new bot. I’m not gonna like blab all of my problems to yall or anything but that’s about it :,) I love all you guys and im really grateful for all of yall <3
